title: Short title
doc_html:
PART IX.  FORESTRY PRODUCT FAIRNESS ACT

§4421.  Short title

This Part shall be cited as the "Forestry Product Fairness Act."

Acts 2009, No. 352, §1, eff. July 6, 2009.
